evidence_summary: Docs-only round refreshes the post-milestone-2 P5-vs-P2 ledger from accepted round-193, round-191, round-181, and round-197 evidence, keeps the refreshed P5 retained-child settlement distinct from the packet-specific P2 C1 folklore ledger, lawfully keeps P5 as the stronger blocker while routing only to direction-3c, and the only scope-helper failure is the stale plan allowlist omitting the required round-local implementation-notes.md.
